source: Hand-structured from public LCD-style medical-necessity language (prototype; not a payer contract)
disclaimer: Criteria are illustrative for hackathon demo only. Not clinically validated.

criteria.label: Symptom duration ≥ 6 weeks
criteria.description: Low back pain present for at least 6 weeks (chronic or subacute course).
criteria.payer_looks_for: Documented onset or duration meeting ≥6 weeks

criteria.label: Failed / incomplete conservative care ≥ 6 weeks
criteria.description: Trial of conservative measures (activity modification, heat, walking/exercise, physical modalities) for ≥6 weeks before advanced imaging.
criteria.payer_looks_for: Duration and modalities of conservative care in the note

criteria.label: NSAID / analgesic trial
criteria.description: Documented trial of NSAID or appropriate analgesic with response and duration, or contraindication.
criteria.payer_looks_for: Drug name, duration of use, and response — not only a new prescription today

criteria.label: Red flags assessed / neurologic exam
criteria.description: Absence (or evaluation) of red flags: bowel/bladder dysfunction, progressive neurologic deficit, fever, unexplained weight loss, night pain; exam without neurologic deficit when applicable.
criteria.payer_looks_for: Negative red-flag review and neurologic exam documented

criteria.label: Functional limitation
criteria.description: Pain interferes with work, ADLs, or mobility in a clinically meaningful way.
criteria.payer_looks_for: Concrete functional impact (sitting tolerance, gait, work duties)
